title: EMI Addon: Extra Mod Integrations
description: EMI addon adding support for as many mods as possible
body:
# Extra Mod Integrations This mod is an addon for the powerful, new recipe viewer [EMI]. This addon adds support for viewing the listed mods' recipes in EMI, including in the EMI Recipe Tree. This addon is still under construction and support for more mods is planned! [EMI]: https://modrinth.com/mod/emi ## Supported Mods | Mod | Support | Notes | |-----------------------------|:-------:|-------------------------------------------------------------------| | Actually Additions | ✅ | NeoForge only, v1.0+ only | | Chipped | ✅ | Fabric & NeoForge, v1.0+ only | | Farmer's Delight | ✅ | NeoForge only (Fabric version has native EMI support), v1.0+ only | | Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks | ✅ | NeoForge only, v1.0+ only | | PneumaticCraft | ✅ | NeoForge only, v1.0+ only | | Rechiseled | ✅ | Fabric & NeoForge, v1.0+ only | | Reliquary | ✅ | NeoForge only, v1.0+ only | | Tech Reborn | ✅ | Fabric only | ✅: Support Completed
🚧: Support In Progress
🔲: Support Planned
⁇: Maybe Support Eventually
❌: Not Supported
[AE2 EMI Crafting]: https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2-emi-crafting ## Screenshots ![Quantum Armor Recipe Tree](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Kneelawk/extra-mod-integrations/1.20.1/screenshots/qarmor-recipe-tree.png) ![Fusion Reactor Recipes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Kneelawk/extra-mod-integrations/1.20.1/screenshots/fusion-recipes.png) ![Entity Melting Recipes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Kneelawk/extra-mod-integrations/1.20.1/screenshots/entity-melting.png) ## License This mod is licensed under the [CC0] License. This means you can do pretty much whet ever you want with it, including adding it to your modpacks, or using its code or assets in your mod. [CC0]: https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/
